claim_bullets.bullet_text: Upon closer examination, a request to transport an item may turn out to be stolen goods and must be returned to its rightful owner (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-260).
Otherwise, adventurers with money could buy up this item, potentially affecting game balance (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-260).

Even if the game master approves the trade of magical items, this item should be considered in short supply, nearly impossible to find, and not for trade (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-260).

source_record_text: This chunk lists magical items such as Guard Glove, Candlestick of Infinite (Un)Luck, and others, and discusses rules for transporting, buying, and trading magical items.
